parsed.generic_mechanism: Textual identity eliminates any craft difference: both use the same sequencing, examples, rhetorical patterns, repetition, and closing recap.

paraphrased_evidence.A: Concrete domestic, social, and bodily examples add texture, but repeated claims, promises, rhetorical questions, emphatic headings, and a final checklist make the latter half feel overextended and promotional.
paraphrased_evidence.B: Specific scenes and analogies enliven a coherent argument, yet its central ideas are repeatedly reasserted; the extended motivational turn and summary consequently weaken momentum and the closing handoff.
